---
applyTo: '**/*.md'
description: 'Rules governing AI behavior and AI-assisted content'
---

# AI guidelines

## Context loading
- AI Native Development Guide
- ADD Core Concepts

## Deterministic requirements
- AI provides suggestions, not decisions
- AI must follow ADD layering
- AI must not invent missing inputs
- AI must request clarification when required inputs are missing

## Structured output
- Suggested templates
- Clearly marked AI-generated content
- Human approval checkpoints
